title: Hearth&Hunger
description: Hearth&Hunger is a vanilla+ Food mod that instead of adding more to the game adds onto already existing parts of the game!
body:
+ What dose this mod add -
Instead of adding completly new foods to the game we expanded on already exisiting foods such as berries and sugar, this mod adds on all sorts of food to the vanillia experiance to make sure it dosent stray to far away from vanillia!
  
+ Why our mod? -
Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -
Some of the mod contains features from the newer snapshots when updating the mod to newer versions in the future it might cause issues (BE AWARE)!

[![Join My Discord](https://i.imgur.com/4ocuGQB.png)](https://discord.gg/3qCU9bGPmt)
